mfa.link_webauthn_description: Link your device or USB hardware
mfa.link_email_2fa_description: Link your email address for 2-step verification
mfa.link_phone_2fa_description: Link your phone number for 2-step verification
mfa.verify_totp_description: Enter the one-time code in app
mfa.verify_webauthn_description: Verify your device or USB hardware
mfa.verify_backup_code_description: Paste the backup code you saved
mfa.verify_email_verification_code_descripti: Enter the code sent to your email
mfa.verify_phone_verification_code_descripti: Enter the code sent to your phone
mfa.onboarding_description: Protect your account with 2-step verification. Choose one or more methods: Passkey, authenticator app (OTP), SMS verification code, or backup codes.
mfa.add_mfa_description: Two-factor verification is enabled. Select your second verification method for secure sign-in.
mfa.add_another_mfa_description: Select another way to add for verifying your identity when sign-in.
mfa.verify_mfa_description: 2-step verification has been enabled for this account. Please select the second way to verify your identity.
mfa.scan_qr_code_description: Scan the following QR code with your authenticator app, such as Google Authenticator, Duo Mobile, Authy, etc.
mfa.copy_and_paste_key_description: Copy and paste the following key into your authenticator app, such as Google Authenticator, Duo Mobile, Authy, etc.
mfa.enter_one_time_code_link_description: Enter the 6-digit verification code generated by the authenticator app.
mfa.enter_one_time_code_description: 2-step verification has been enabled for this account. Please enter the one-time code shown on your linked authenticator app.
mfa.enter_email_verification_code_descriptio: 2-step authentication has been enabled for this account. Please enter the email verification code sent to {{identifier}}.
mfa.enter_phone_verification_code_descriptio: 2-step authentication has been enabled for this account. Please enter the SMS verification code sent to {{identifier}}.
mfa.save_backup_code_description: You can use one of these backup code to access your account if you have trouble during 2-step verification in another ways. Each code may be used only once.
mfa.backup_code_hint: Make sure copy them and save in a safe place.
mfa.new_backup_codes_generated: New backup codes have replaced your old codes. Save them in a safe place as soon as possible.
mfa.enter_backup_code_description: Enter the backup code you saved when the 2-step verification was initially enabled.
mfa.create_passkey_description: Register your passkey using device biometrics, security keys (e.g., YubiKey), or other available methods.
mfa.verify_via_passkey_description: Use passkey to verify by your device password or biometrics, scanning QR code, or using USB security key like YubiKey.
mfa.webauthn_not_ready: WebAuthn is not ready yet. Please try again later.
mfa.webauthn_not_supported: WebAuthn is not supported in this browser.
mfa.webauthn_failed_to_create: Failed to create. Please try again.
mfa.webauthn_failed_to_verify: Failed to verify. Please try again.

descriptions.profile: Your name, username, avatar, and other profile info

avatar_upload.error_storage_not_configured: Unable to upload your photo. Please try again later.
avatar_upload.error_upload: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
avatar_upload.error_save: Failed to save your photo. Please try again.
avatar_upload.error_crop: Failed to crop the image. Please try again.

page.title: Account
page.security_description: Change your account settings here to ensure your account security.

verification.title: Security verification
verification.description: Verify it's you to protect your account security. Please select the method to verify your identity.
verification.error_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.
verification.error_invalid_code: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
verification.error_verify_failed: Verification failed. Please enter the code again.
verification.verification_required: Verification expired. Please verify your identity again.
verification.no_available_methods_description: You don't have any verification methods set up. Please add a password, email, or phone number to your account first.

password_verification.title: Verify password
password_verification.description: Verify it's you to protect your account security. Enter your password.
password_verification.error_failed: Incorrect password. Please check your input.

email.name: Email verification code
email.description: Send verification code to your email

phone.name: Phone verification code
phone.description: Send verification code to your phone number

email.title: Link email
email.description: Link your email to sign in or help with account recovery.
email.verification_description: The verification code has been sent to your email {{email_address}}.
email.verification_required: Verification expired. Please verify your identity again.

phone.title: Link phone number
phone.description: Link your phone number to sign in or help with account recovery.
phone.verification_description: The verification code has been sent to your phone {{phone_number}}.
phone.verification_required: Verification expired. Please verify your identity again.

username.title: Set username
username.description: Username must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.

security.turn_on_2_step_verification_description: Add an extra layer of security. You'll be prompted for a second verification step at sign-in.
security.turn_off_2_step_verification_description: Disabling 2-step verification will remove the extra layer of protection from your account at sign-in. Are you sure you want to continue?
security.no_verification_method_warning: You haven't added a second verification method. Add at least one to enable 2-step verification at sign-in.
security.passkey_sign_in_prompt: Prompt to set up a passkey
security.passkey_sign_in_prompt_description: When on, you'll be asked to set up a passkey for faster, more secure sign-in.
security.remove_username_confirmation_description: Once removed, you will no longer be able to sign in with this username. Are you sure you want to continue?
security.remove_email_confirmation_description: Once removed, you will no longer be able to sign in with this email address. Are you sure you want to continue?
security.remove_phone_confirmation_description: Once removed, you will no longer be able to sign in with this phone number. Are you sure you want to continue?

social.not_enabled: This social sign-in method is not enabled. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
social.remove_confirmation_description: If you remove {{connector}}, you may not be able to sign in with it until you add it back again.

password.title: Set password
password.description: Create a new password to secure your account.

email_verification.title: Verify your email
email_verification.prepare_description: Verify it's you to protect your account security. Send the verification code to your email.
email_verification.description: The verification code has been sent to your email {{email}}. Enter the code to continue.
email_verification.error_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.
email_verification.error_verify_failed: Verification failed. Please enter the code again.
email_verification.error_invalid_code: The verification code is invalid or has expired.

phone_verification.title: Verify your phone
phone_verification.prepare_description: Verify it's you to protect your account security. Send the verification code to your phone.
phone_verification.description: The verification code has been sent to your phone {{phone}}. Enter the code to continue.
phone_verification.error_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.
phone_verification.error_verify_failed: Verification failed. Please enter the code again.
phone_verification.error_invalid_code: The verification code is invalid or has expired.

mfa.totp_already_added: You have already added an authenticator app. Please remove the existing one first.
mfa.totp_not_enabled: Authenticator app OTP is not enabled. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
mfa.backup_code_already_added: You already have active backup codes. Please use or remove them before generating new ones.
mfa.backup_code_not_enabled: Backup code is not enabled. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
mfa.backup_code_requires_other_mfa: Backup codes require another MFA method to be set up first.
mfa.passkey_not_enabled: Passkey is not enabled. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
mfa.passkey_already_registered: This passkey is already registered to your account. Please use a different authenticator.

default.description: Your changes have been saved successfully.

email.description: Your account's email address has been successfully changed.

phone.title: Phone number updated!
phone.description: Your account's phone number has been successfully changed.

password.title: Password updated!
password.description: Your account's password has been successfully changed.

totp.title: Authenticator app added!
totp.description: Your authenticator app has been successfully linked to your account.

totp_replaced.title: Authenticator app replaced!
totp_replaced.description: Your authenticator app has been successfully replaced.

backup_code.title: Backup codes generated!
backup_code.description: Your backup codes have been saved. Keep them in a safe place.

passkey.title: Passkey added!
passkey.description: Your passkey has been successfully linked to your account.

social.title: Social account linked!
social.description: Your social account has been successfully linked.

backup_code.title: Backup codes
backup_code.description: You can use one of these backup codes to access your account if you have trouble during 2-step verification in another ways. Each code may be used only once.
backup_code.copy_hint: Make sure copy them and save in a safe place.

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.add_another_description: Register your passkey using device biometrics, security keys (e.g., YubiKey), or other available methods.
passkey.delete_confirmation_description: If you remove this passkey, you will not be able to verify with it.
passkey.rename_description: Enter a new name for this passkey.
passkey.name_passkey_description: You have successfully verified this device for 2-step authentication. Customize the name to recognize if you have multiple keys.

sessions.page_description: Manage your active sessions and authorized third-party applications.
sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.revoke_session_description: This will sign out the session and revoke all associated access. Are you sure you want to continue?
sessions.third_party_apps_load_failed: Failed to load third-party apps. Please try again.
sessions.revoke_grant_description: This will revoke all access granted to this application. Are you sure you want to continue?
sessions.revoke_grant_failed: Failed to revoke some grants. Please try again.
